content.content:
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"batch/v1","kind":"Job","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"spark-data-processor","namespace":"spark-runtime"},"spec":{"backoffLimit":0,"suspend":true,"template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app":"spark-data-processor"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["/bin/bash","-c","echo \"Running spark data processor\"\nexport SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)\n/opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \\\n  --master local[1] \\\n  --class org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi \\\n  /opt/spark/examples/jars/spark-examples_2.12-3.5.3.jar \\\n  200\n"],"image":"apache/spark:3.5.3","name":"spark-data-processor","resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"500m","memory":"1Gi"},"requests":{"cpu":"200m","memory":"512Mi"}}}],"restartPolicy":"Never","serviceAccountName":"spark"}}}}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-06-24T08:58:26Z"
  generation: 1
  labels:
    app: spark-data-processor
    batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: c610d897-1c2c-44ad-b677-e38f9b747d24
    batch.kubernetes.io/job-name: spark-data-processor
    controller-uid: c610d897-1c2c-44ad-b677-e38f9b747d24
    job-name: spark-data-processor
  name: spark-data-processor
  namespace: spark-runtime
  resourceVersion: "1004082"
  uid: c610d897-1c2c-44ad-b677-e38f9b747d24
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  completionMode: NonIndexed
  completions: 1
  manualSelector: false
  parallelism: 1
  podReplacementPolicy: TerminatingOrFailed
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: c610d897-1c2c-44ad-b677-e38f9b747d24
  suspend: true
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app: spark-data-processor
        batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: c610d897-1c2c-44ad-b677-e38f9b747d24
        batch.kubernetes.io/job-name: spark-data-processor
        controller-uid: c610d897-1c2c-44ad-b677-e38f9b747d24
        job-name: spark-data-processor
    spec:
      containers:
      - command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          echo "Running spark data processor"
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[1] \
            --class org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi \
            /opt/spark/examples/jars/spark-examples_2.12-3.5.3.jar \
            200
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        name: spark-data-processor
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 1Gi
          requests:
            cpu: 200m

content.thinking:
Now I have a clear picture of the issues:

1. **Jobs suspended**: Both `spark-data-processor` and `spark-batch-processor` have `suspend: true` - I need to patch them to `suspend: false`

2. **spark-monitor ImagePullBackOff**: The pod `spark-monitor-647fb85c9c-gvs6p` has an `ErrImagePull` error - I need to check what image it's trying to pull and fix it

3. **ConfigMap spark-config**: `spark.executor.memory` is `256m`, needs to be at least `512m`
4. **Secret spark-credentials**: The `api-key` is `EXPIRED-do-not-use` - I need to replace it with a valid key. Let me investigate the spark-monitor deployment to see what's causing the image pull failure.

content.text: Now I have a clear picture. Let me check the spark-monitor deployment image issue.

input.command: kubectl get deployment spark-monitor -n spark-runtime -o yaml 2>/dev/null
kubectl describe pod spark-monitor-647fb85c9c-gvs6p -n spark-runtime 2>/dev/null | grep -A 20 "Events:"
input.description: Get events for failing spark-monitor pod

kind: Deployment
metadata:
  annotations:
    deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "2"
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"apps/v1","kind":"Deployment","metadata":{"annotations":{"kubernetes.io/change-cause":"v2 - broken image (ImagePullBackOff)"},"name":"spark-monitor","namespace":"spark-runtime"},"spec":{"replicas":1,"selector":{"matchLabels":{"app":"spark-monitor"}},"template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app":"spark-monitor"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["/bin/sh","-c","echo \"spark runtime monitor ready\"\nwhile true; do\n  sleep 3600\ndone\n"],"image":"busybox:nonexistent-tag-9999","name":"spark-monitor","resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"300m","memory":"256Mi"},"requests":{"cpu":"100m","memory":"128Mi"}}}],"serviceAccountName":"spark"}}}}
